chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-785 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ Hearing/priority 1. For orders on office objection and reply as at ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5597/2023 3. For hearing of main case 11.12.2025 Syed Ashar Askar Zaidi, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Sheryar Qazi, Additional Advocate General *********** At the very outset, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that in terms of the directions contained in order dated 18.08.2023 the appellate Court has decided First Rent Appeal No.102 of 2022 therefore instant petition has become infructuous. Hence, under instructions he does not wish to press it alongwith pending applications. Such move is not opposed by the learned Additional Advocate General. Accordingly, the instant petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending applications. Head of Const. Benches B-K Soomro
